notes: v1.6.97 — MICRO-CUT: asset TAG (slot serial) in the rack Device List. Slots gained additive serial+dns at the Master-scope freeze (Ship 2A, v1.6.89) but the serial had NO UI consumer — stored, never shown. The deployment rack-detail Device List (deploy_showRackDetail) renders name/model/U-position per slot; the frozen slot.serial now renders as a 'TAG <serial>' sub-line, mirroring the Master tab's TAG treatment (master_renderResultRows). dns is NOT separately rendered because slot.name already IS the dns (master_rackToElevation sets name = host.dns, falling back to model) — surfacing dns would duplicate the device name, so only the asset tag adds new info. The TAG value is long-press-selectable (-webkit-user-select:all) for a gloved copy on the floor. Guarded by `if (slot.serial)` so legacy EDP-seeded slots (serial:'' ) skip cleanly — zero regression. Reuses existing device-row styling; NO new CSS (block-0 braces 2494, zero delta). Snapshot/freeze, deployment creation, reconcile, guided-path machinery untouched. node --check 2/2 + sw.js OK, JSON valid, three stamps at v1.6.97. Built in Claude Code on b51ca7f (v1.6.96) per the one-builder rule; web-Claude post-merge parity review pending; operator walkthrough (a Master-scoped deployment whose hosts carry serials → expand DEVICES → TAG line present + copyable) pending.
